text: Ever wondered why your body shuts down during dreams? It's called REM atonia; your brain inhibits most muscles. This protective mechanism prevents you from acting out dreams. However, misfires can lead to sleep paralysis, an eerie experience. Preliminary research suggests this might be a brain glitch. Want to dive deeper into sleep science? Hit like and subscribe!
